hero.title: Groups, outreach, and everyday parish community
hero.lede: Use this page to show parish groups, practical support, outreach work, and community activities.

intro.title: A home for groups and ministries
intro.body: Replace the placeholder copy here with the real picture of parish life, its volunteers, and its works of mercy.
intro.asideBody: This sidebar can introduce a local charity, support project, or parish outreach partner with a short summary and contact link.

cards.title: Groups and ministries
paragraphs: Use this section for catechists, choirs, altar servers, readers, youth groups, prayer groups, social events, and volunteer teams.

cards.title: Practical help and local care
paragraphs: Use this area for a parish foodbank, practical help fund, warm space, or community pantry.

cards.title: Refugee and community support
paragraphs: Replace this card with the parish's real outreach projects, partner organisations, or community support work.

cards.title: Events and shared life
paragraphs: Use this space for parish lunches, feast-day celebrations, fundraising, pilgrimages, and school partnerships.

cards.title: Photo albums
paragraphs: The gallery page can hold multiple albums, each with its own rotating set of images and captions.
